name_cn:
Genuine Grade
CE Early Spring MiniSoft16, chubby little cute crossbody bag. Following the mini size of 16, Soft 16 also followed suit and released a super cute crossbody style, mini soft. The hand feel is simply amazing, soft leather, can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody, guys can also carry it, adjustable strap design, lightweight!!
Style: Versatile item
Capacity: Should be the ceiling level among mini bags, very spacious
Style No.: 100352 Grey (with original packaging)
Size: 18-12.5-6
